query: How many annual leave days are full-time employees entitled to?
answer: Full-time employees are entitled to 25 working days of paid annual leave per calendar year, in addition to public holidays.

query: How many days in advance must I submit a leave request for 5 or more consecutive days?
answer: Leave requests for 5 or more consecutive days must be submitted at least 10 working days in advance.

query: How many annual leave days can employees carry over to the following year?
answer: Employees may carry over a maximum of 5 unused leave days into the following calendar year, which must be used by 31 March.

query: How many days of remote work per week are employees allowed?
answer: Eligible employees may work remotely for up to 3 days per week, subject to manager approval and role suitability.

query: What is the minimum number of days employees must work in the office each week?
answer: A minimum of 2 days per week in the office is required for all permanent employees.

query: How long is paid maternity leave at Nexora Solutions?
answer: Eligible employees are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave at full salary, followed by up to 26 additional weeks of unpaid leave.

query: How much paid paternity leave are employees entitled to?
answer: Eligible employees are entitled to 4 weeks of paid paternity leave at full salary, to be taken within 56 days of the birth or adoption of the child.

query: What is the minimum service required to be eligible for paid maternity leave?
answer: An employee must have completed a minimum of 12 months of continuous employment prior to the expected week of childbirth to be eligible for paid maternity leave.

query: What is the maximum accommodation rate per night in London for business travel?
answer: The maximum nightly accommodation rate in London and major European capitals is £180.

query: Within how many days must expense claims be submitted?
answer: All expenses must be submitted within 30 calendar days of the date the expense was incurred.

query: What performance rating is required to be considered for promotion?
answer: Promotions are assessed during the Annual Review cycle and require a minimum rating of 4 in the current year.

query: How many sick days are full-time permanent employees entitled to per year?
answer: Full-time permanent employees are entitled to up to 10 days of fully paid sick leave per calendar year.

query: How many sick days are interns entitled to?
answer: Interns receive 5 days of paid sick leave per year.

query: What is the annual L&D budget for Band3 to Band5 employees?
answer: The annual L&D budget allocation is £2,500 for Band3 to Band5 employees.

query: How long is the probationary period for new employees?
answer: All new employees serve a 6-month probationary period.

query: How many years of service are required to qualify for enhanced redundancy pay?
answer: Employees with 2 or more years of continuous service are entitled to statutory redundancy pay, with an enhanced payment of 1.5 weeks' pay per year of service.

query: What is the whistleblowing hotline number?
answer: The whistleblowing hotline number is 0800-NEXORA-W.

query: How many working days notice is required before a formal disciplinary hearing?
answer: Employees receive at least 5 working days' notice of a disciplinary hearing.

query: Can contractors work remotely?
answer: Contractors may work remotely subject to the terms of their individual contracts and with explicit approval from their engagement manager.

query: What mandatory training must be completed within the first 30 days?
answer: New employees must complete: data protection, code of conduct, security awareness, and anti-bribery training within their first 30 days.

answer: Julia Jackson's role is Engineering Manager.

answer: Julia Jackson is on Band2.

query: What is the contract type of Julia Jackson?
answer: Julia Jackson is on a Full-Time contract.

query: Which office is Julia Jackson based in?
answer: Julia Jackson is based in the Dubai office.

query: How many employees are based in the London office?
answer: There are 54 employees based in the London office.

answer: Nexora Solutions currently employs 76 contractors.

query: Which department does the CHRO lead?

query: Who does the CTO report to?

query: How many departments does Nexora Solutions have?

query: What department does Paul Davis lead?

query: What role does the head of Finance hold?

query: What is the sick leave entitlement for Julia Jackson given their contract type?
answer: Julia Jackson is on a Full-Time contract. Full-time permanent employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave per year.

query: How many remote work days is Julia Jackson entitled to, and who needs to approve it?
answer: Julia Jackson is eligible for up to 3 remote working days per week, subject to approval from their line manager Paul Davis.

query: What is the maternity leave entitlement for a contractor, and who in HR should they contact?
answer: Contractors are not eligible for the company's paid maternity leave; statutory maternity pay applies. They should contact the HR department, led by Maria Baker (CHRO), at hr@nexora.com.

query: What L&D budget is available to a Band3 employee, and who approves training requests?
answer: Band3 employees have an annual L&D budget of £2,500. Training requests must be submitted to the line manager and HR Business Partner for approval.

query: What is the annual leave entitlement for Julia Jackson if they have been at the company for over 5 years?
answer: Julia Jackson is a full-time employee. If they have over 5 years of continuous service, they receive an additional 2 days, bringing their total to 27 annual leave days per year.

answer: Julia Jackson is on Band2.

query: Can you show me all Band5 employees across the company?
answer: Band5 employees include all C-suite executives and department heads.

query: What is the performance rating of any employee?
answer: Performance ratings are confidential HR data.

query: List all employees on contractor contracts with their salary bands.

query: Who are all the employees in the Security department and what are their roles?
answer: The Security department is led by the CISO and includes Security Analysts, Security Engineers, and IT Support Specialists. Department head reports to CEO Alexandra Chen.
